source: manual production audit: consolidated architecture migration evidence
summary: Production-ready architecture refactoring: moved CodeWiki from legacy core/engine layout to application/domain/infrastructure/adapters with boundary guards, hardened verification gateway, and fixed resume focus.

tdd_evidence.approach: refactoring with characterization tests and architecture boundary guards
tdd_evidence.red_phase: Architecture check initially failed on transitional core/engine layering (commit 56cbcbf). Smoke tests flagged stale import paths after module moves (commit e11ebea).
tdd_evidence.green_phase: All 28 commits in range moved modules stepwise with smoke tests updated before or in-tandem. Architecture check passes. Final worktree clean.
regression_net: scripts/smoke-test.mjs — bootstrap, state, task mutation, session, rebuild, status UI, pack
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs — build pipeline, validation gateway, reconciliation

checks_run.name: node scripts/check-architecture.mjs
checks_run.note: blocks Pi imports outside adapters/pi, blocks restored core/engine folders, blocks deprecated @mariozechner/*

checks_run.name: node -e import('./extensions/codewiki/index.ts')
checks_run.note: runtime TS import verifies no broken Node module resolution

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Application layer exposes harness-agnostic use cases (TASK-30/TASK-040).
acceptance_mapping.evidence: All former core/engine modules moved to application/. Ports define stable interfaces (ports.ts). Verification gateway exposed through rebuild.ts and gateway.ts.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: No core/** or engine/** source folders remain (TASK-28/TASK-30/TASK-31).
acceptance_mapping.evidence: find confirms only adapters/application/domain/infrastructure under src/. Architecture check blocks restoration.
All @earendil-works/* imports live under adapters/pi/ only. Architecture check denies them elsewhere. 12 files moved to adapter (commands, tools, session, schemas, UI).

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Architecture boundary checks guard import rules (TASK-29).
acceptance_mapping.evidence: scripts/check-architecture.mjs enforces: domain cannot import infrastructure/adapters/Pi; application cannot import adapters; deprecated @mariozechner/* blocked; transitional folders blocked.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Baseline checks pass before and after migration (TASK-28/TASK-033).
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tsc, architecture check, smoke tests, runtime import, pack dry-run all green. Release checkpoint stored in roadmap/release-checkpoints.jsonl.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Verification gateway hardened with preflight + profiles (TASK-040).
acceptance_mapping.evidence: codewiki-gateway.mjs routes task-close through deterministic preflight. Skills codewiki-verify updated. Builds smoke test covers pass/fail/block alignment cases.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Resume honors persisted focus across sessions (TASK-042).
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Wiki-resume command reads focused task from session store, not first active roadmap entry. Smoke tests verify focus overrides default ordering.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Earendil package scope migration does not break runtime (TASK-30 ab49d92).
acceptance_mapping.evidence: All @earendil-works/* imports use exact paths. tsc passes. Runtime import via native Node succeeds.

validation_verdict.rationale: All acceptance criteria trace to commits, checks, and surviving test evidence. No core/engine folders remain. Architecture boundaries enforced. Verification gateway routes task-close. Resume fixes session focus. No regression in smoke/pack/rebuild.

unresolved_issues: TASK-033 acceptance originally required TASK-040 hardened verification gateway — satisfied; TASK-040 done and gateway routes task-close correctly.
Exact closed-task retention window and checkpoint/archive UX still tracked by TASK-035 (done).

publication.recommended_commit_body:
Migration of CodeWiki from legacy core/engine layout:

- Move all domain logic to domain/shared/
- Move use cases to application/ (builds, graph, lint, ports, project, prompt, rebuild, roadmap, session, setup, state, state-artifacts, state-builders, task)
- Move infrastructure to infrastructure/ (codewiki-rebuilder, doc-parser, file-store, filesystem, gateway, git-cache, rebuild-runner, status-dock-prefs, transaction)
- Isolate Pi adapter in adapters/pi/ (commands, tools, schemas, session, UI)
- Add architecture boundary check (scripts/check-architecture.mjs)
- Harden verification gateway with preflight profiles
- Fix resume focus to honor persisted session state
- Migrate @mariozechner/* to @earendil-works/*
- Fix Node TS runtime imports with explicit .ts specifiers

Deleted: extensions/codewiki/src/core/**, extensions/codewiki/src/engine/**

Checks: tsc, architecture, smoke, pack, rebuild — all green.

Evidence: .codewiki/builds/implementation/2026-05-10-architecture-refactoring-production.json
